financial_evidence.topology_note: financial_evidence: no attribution, no downgrade, no cap

operational_evidence.topology_note: operational_evidence: no attribution, no downgrade, no cap

management_expectation.topology_note: management_expectation: attribution + confidence cap both applied

topology_differentiation: governance rules are source_type-specific: financial/operational=no-intervention; narrative=attribution; management=attribution+confidence-cap
claim_boundary: Current AI governance effect is observable but condition-dependent.
